{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192651669C49ACA5C2ADC1545A"}"},"total":608},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7574463372864783129","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"西游诡向化，作者有自己的思考，很独特的切入视角，看到菩提祖师的道袍活像一张被生扒下的皮，风干后在风中微晃。太有感觉了菩提祖师在那种诡异磨灭下留存的气度，在大恐怖降临后都没被磨灭的大道坦荡","text_exts":[{"e":30,"s":26,"text":"菩提祖师","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%8F%A9%E6%8F%90%E7%A5%96%E5%B8%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774265211ADC1545A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227574463372864783129%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227549369474881686552%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%8F%A9%E6%8F%90%E7%A5%96%E5%B8%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763569474,"group_id":"7549369474881686552","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"汪汪汪汪汪汪汪汪汪汪汪","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzQxkQbCBluUjTNXUTvKM+ZbF7hHD89GIM8ptgZDApC0","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8e709d8b7c784a109de4062508e44271~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787386&x-signature=uciOiPDodSoTAaTD5%2BD6GSDFdzE%3D","user_id":"3802557686494231","user_name":"凌凌汪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3802557686494231","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7549369474881686552","book_info":{"abstract":"【规则怪谈+首播+国运+无女主】
　　蓝星怪谈降临，龙国国运衰败，天选者在绝望中挣扎。
　　新选中的天选者陈玄，一个熟读《西游记》、对神话人物如数家珍的宅男。
　　当他被传送到白骨森森的高老庄，看到那变成腐肉猪脸的猪八戒，和眼神空洞、只会念经的唐僧时，他惊了。
　　这不《西游记》吗？
　　S级副本，其他天选者被妖怪追得魂飞魄散，试图用佛法感化，或用武力抵抗。
　　陈玄却发现，这个怪谈副本的规则，竟然是基于《西游记》中“妖怪”的视角和“人情世故”的扭曲。
　　通关互动？扮演人设？简单！
　　开局扮演被贬下凡、法力全失的沙僧，却凭借对“取经团队”内部矛盾的深刻理解，以及对各路妖怪“背景”的熟知，在唐僧、猪八戒、孙悟空之间左右逢源。
　　他不是在取经，而是在“整顿”这个诡异的西游团队，利用妖怪的“弱点”和“关系网”，把怪谈副本玩成了“神仙打架，凡人吃瓜”的修罗场。
　　在其他天选者还在躲避妖怪时，陈玄已经带着龙国在诡异西游中横冲直撞，带着龙国成为蓝星最强国。
　　“我以为我在看西游，没想到我成了西游的……‘幕后黑手’。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7297cefecf6357cba7befb4979fadb83","author":"一笔砚林","author_id":"","book_id":"7549369474881686552","book_name":"疯猴，烂猪，诡唐僧，我沙僧麻了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7550972035225109054","read_count":"32598","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"869420"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"368","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,西游衍生,规则怪谈,副本,国运,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c09ea9709886360470869c9bf68852a0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449211&x-signature=2yeJJzaaTLcQt4A4JWSqUJ%2B0PVw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1867438270457997","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"144"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192651669C49ACA5C2ADC1545A"}"}, 　　蓝星怪谈降临，龙国国运衰败，天选者在绝望中挣扎。
　　新选中的天选者陈玄，一个熟读《西游记》、对神话人物如数家珍的宅男。
　　当他被传送到白骨森森的高老庄，看到那变成腐肉猪脸的猪八戒，和眼神空洞、只会念经的唐僧时，他惊了。
　　这不《西游记》吗？
　　S级副本，其他天选者被妖怪追得魂飞魄散，试图用佛法感化，或用武力抵抗。
　　陈玄却发现，这个怪谈副本的规则，竟然是基于《西游记》中“妖怪”的视角和“人情世故”的扭曲。
　　通关互动？扮演人设？简单！
　　开局扮演被贬下凡、法力全失的沙僧，却凭借对“取经团队”内部矛盾的深刻理解，以及对各路妖怪“背景”的熟知，在唐僧、猪八戒、孙悟空之间左右逢源。
　　他不是在取经，而是在“整顿”这个诡异的西游团队，利用妖怪的“弱点”和“关系网”，把怪谈副本玩成了“神仙打架，凡人吃瓜”的修罗场。
　　在其他天选者还在躲避妖怪时，陈玄已经带着龙国在诡异西游中横冲直撞，带着龙国成为蓝星最强国。

，什么天选者什么直播，但是越往后看真的越来越好看，世界观已经构建起来了，目前已经追平了，后面副本看起来可能有点乱（懵），但基本主心骨是没有偏差的，值得一看的","text_exts":[{"e":39,"s":35,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774265211ADC1545A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227593613151383159577%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227549369474881686552%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768030710,"group_id":"7549369474881686552","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"愿你我相逢似千里故人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxIhWrl//bF7VUiUn98cSGpZdFepCrv9uiAzJ2RUD0lL","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7b034e9e6b884545a8fc5e868e5ef57b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790069&x-signature=cW3GY1hCvwt2GMMGNrQMpDXOFIg%3D","user_id":"3566456366968046","user_name":"初度兮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3566456366968046","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7549369474881686552","book_info":{"abstract":"【规则怪谈+首播+国运+无女主】

　　S级副本，其他天选者被妖怪追得魂飞魄散，试图用佛法感化，或用武力抵抗。

　　通关互动？扮演人设？简单！
　　开局扮演被贬下凡、法力全失的沙僧，却凭借对“取经团队”内部矛盾的深刻理解，以及对各路妖怪“背景”的熟知，在唐僧、猪八戒、孙悟空之间左右逢源。
